title: AuthorizationScope
description: Enum contract for the authorization scope that governs how a record may be used. This is a reusable enum contract, not a stored data instance — no instances are committed to the repo. Storage-agnostic; other schemas reference `#/$defs/AuthorizationScope`. See docs/GOVERNANCE_STATES.md and docs/STATE_TRANSITIONS.md.

reason.description: Optional reason/justification for the current scope (e.g. why revoked).

set_by.description: Anonymized actor who set the scope.

set_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the scope was set.
